message:
fix: resolve integration test compilation errors in sharding and ordering tests

- spork_ordering_conformance: migrate to current APIs (TaskId::new_for_test,
  DownReason::Normal, MonitorRef::new_for_test, ChildName)
- sharding_correctness: rewrite to use LabRuntime low-level API (create_root_region,
  create_task, schedule, run_until_quiescent) replacing removed block_on API
- monitor: add MonitorRef::new_for_test for integration test construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
